author: Work With Indies
title: Plumeria Studio Hiring Character Artists
content: Plumeria Studio is hiring a Stylized Character Concept Artist and a 3D Character Artist to help bring an anime-stylized multiplayer action game to life! Remote, Freelance. Portfolio required. Apply: https://www.workwithindies.com/work-with/plumeria-studio

author: Murky Games
title: Murky Games Open to Artists
content: Want to make games with us? Murky Games is open to artists, animators, writers, devs & VAs — roles or collabs. https://murkygames.com/work-with-us/
